posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
To our Sydney-based community: Apply for our in-person Dashboard + Reporting Masterclass

Interested in becoming a dashboard and reporting guru?! Join our free Sydney Masterclass on the 30th of August.

These are hands-on sessions for our intermediate to advanced users, where our experts will take you through the creation of various types of dashboards and reports. As spaces are limited, you are not guaranteed a spot until you’ve received a confirmation email from us.

There are 2 times available for your convenience - please only select 1 session and apply via the attached link:

  • Sydney in-person session Wednesday 30 August 10.00am - 12.00pm
  • Sydney in-person session Wednesday 30 August 1.30pm - 3.30pm

We hope to see some of your faces there
